stories.title: AgentCore SDK invocation from App Runner
acceptanceCriteria: conversation.ts uses InvokeAgentRuntimeCommand when AGENTCORE_RUNTIME_ARN is set
AgentCore runtime receives traffic (visible in CloudWatch logs)
Fallback to direct mode works when AgentCore fails

stories.title: Korean file recognition in agent conversation
acceptanceCriteria: Agent tools use closure-bound documentId/s3Uri (no LLM pass-through)
Korean PDF upload triggers analyze_document with correct s3Uri

stories.title: Multi-arch Docker build and deploy
acceptanceCriteria: App Runner deploys successfully with new image
AgentCore runtime updated with SERVER_MODE=agent env var

stories.title: NFD fallback + File proxy + Preview SSE
acceptanceCriteria: getDocumentBuffer tries NFC, falls back to NFD on NoSuchKey
Preview SSE streams method results with 60s CF timeout

stories.title: Token cost + Method Comparison + Pipeline strategy + Architecture
acceptanceCriteria: Method comparison shown after all methods complete
Pipeline strategy reflected in smart pipeline
Architecture page uses pipeline execution results

stories.title: Conversation fallback + Processing sidebar removed
acceptanceCriteria: Three-tier routing: AgentCore > HTTP proxy > direct
No Processing nav item in sidebar
